name: Bits-o-Barley Cranberry Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cranberry juice, bits-o-barley, salt, raisins, cinnamon, and lemon peel in a large bowl.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and cover the bowl.
4. Allow the mixture to stand until all the juice is absorbed.
5. Add honey and stir until well combined.
6. Serve warm or cold.
